title: handles_projectile_motion: endpoint pull-back block has inverted result guard + wrong base operand vs retail ASM
repro: audit: asm_audit.py entry handles_projectile_motion; diff ASM after-room-loop pull-back block (chrobjhandler.c:5657-5717) vs live C (chrobjhandler.c:5207-5227)

history.note: Projectile deposit-motion after-room-loop endpoint pull-back. 'result' (stack 0x2a4) init 1 (C:5069), set 0 only on a recorded background hit (ASM sw zero 0x2a4 ~:5615; C result=0 :5186). TWO divergences in the pull-back block: (1) GUARD POLARITY INVERTED. ASM :5660 'bnezl $t5,.L7F0426FC' with $t5=result skips the block when result!=0, i.e. runs it ONLY when result==0 (a wall/bg hit occurred). Live C :5207 'if (result != 0)' runs the block on the OPPOSITE branch (no hit). (2) WRONG BASE OPERAND. ASM reads the base from ($s3)=arg2 (:5698 'lwc1 $f6,($s3)'; $s3 is arg2, cf. call :5724 'sw $s3,0x10(sp)'=5th arg), i.e. arg2 -= frac*delta; then copies arg2->dest(sp+0x268). Live C reads the base from dest (=arg1, init C:5079-5081): arg2 = dest - frac*delta; dest = arg2 (C:5220-5226). frac=0.1/dist (or 0.5 if dist<=0.1); delta=saved_arg1-runtime_pos (identical both). NET (passed dest,arg2 to projectileFindCollidingProp): on a wall HIT retail clamps the collision-test endpoint AND reported impact to bg_hit_pos-0.1*travel; the port instead skips the clamp on hit (passes dest=arg1 through the wall, arg2=raw bg_hit_pos) and applies the -0.1 shorten only on the NO-hit path. Enumerated: neither the hit nor no-hit case reconciles between ASM and C -> not a compensating decompiler restructuring. REACHABILITY: live path -- sub_GAME_7F042EB4 (chrobjhandler.c:6403) calls this under (runtime_bitflags & RUNTIMEBITFLAG_DEPOSIT) && projectile->flags&4, dispatched from object-physics tick (chrobjhandler.c:9452/9562/9946); divergence is unconditional within the function. NOT YET verified: exactly which projectile/weapon types set projectile->flags&4, and runtime pixel/trace confirmation of the through-wall impact (static-derived). Found by S-tier Task 2.4 ASM-audit batch-2. DO NOT fix from this note; re-derive from ASM. Fix polarity if actioned: default-ON GE007_NO_PROJECTILE_ENDPOINT_CLAMP_FIX.
